topic: I have hiked the same three mile trail every October for nine years and this year there was a fourth mile marker
title: I Have Hiked the Same Three Mile Trail for Nine Years. This Year There Was a Fourth Mile Marker | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The trail is three miles. This October I passed a fourth mile marker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden trail mile marker post in autumn woods, a hand carved number four visible on the post, fallen leaves around the base, low overcast forest light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Devil's Lake. Bluff Trail. East ridge loop. Every October for nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a forested ridge trail in autumn, golden leaves on the path, distant lake visible through the trees, no people on the trail, soft afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same loop. Same parking lot. Same three markers.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small gravel trailhead parking lot at dawn, a single trail map kiosk at the entrance, mist on the ground, no cars in the lot, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last Sunday I passed the third mile marker and the trail kept going.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a forest trail extending past a worn wooden mile marker post number three, autumn light low through bare branches, no end visible down the path, vertical 9:16 framing
low angle shot of a pair of hiking boots on a leaf covered trail, the trail extending forward into shadowed woods, late afternoon light filtered through trees, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Four hundred feet later the fourth marker.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden trail mile marker post with a hand carved number four, the wood weathered and grey, surrounded by ferns and fallen leaves, dim forest light, vertical 9:16 framing
extreme close shot of weathered grey wood grain on a trail post, deep lichen patches and dry rot visible, dim ambient forest light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Past it the trail opened into a clearing I had never seen.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small forest clearing in autumn, soft sunlight breaking through bare branches into a circle of grass, a wooden picnic bench visible in the center, fog at the treeline, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A picnic bench. A thermos still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a weathered wooden picnic bench with a metal thermos sitting on top, faint steam visible rising from the cap, autumn leaves scattered around the bench, dim ambient forest light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My name was carved into the wood beside it.
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close shot of weathered wooden bench planks with a name carved deep into the surface, the letters dark with age and weather, late afternoon light at low angle, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went back to the parking lot. My car was the only one.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a gravel trailhead parking lot at dusk, a single sedan parked in the otherwise empty lot, the trail map kiosk to one side, fog beginning to rise, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last week I drove back. There were three markers again.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of the same forest trail in autumn, the third wooden mile marker visible, the path beyond it ending abruptly at a wall of trees and brush, dim overcast light, vertical 9:16 framing
